name: Suspicious Child Process Creation via OneNote
description: Detects the creation of suspicious child processes, execution of binaries from non-default paths, and script file execution through OneNote, which can indicate exploitation or malicious document usage.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the child process.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the child process (e.g., powershell.exe, cmd.exe).

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process, which should be 'onenote.exe'.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The full path to the executable image of the child process.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the child process.
